input.patchText:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: draft-poem.txt
*** Move to: final-poem.txt
@@
 A lamp is glowing in the hall.
 A shadow leans against the wall.
-No one speaks above the floor.
+No one stirs behind the door.
 Evening waits beside the door.
*** End Patch
